allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "node: $\(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; if \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { node --version }; Write-Output "pnpm: $\(\(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; if \(Get-Command pnpm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { pnpm --version }; Write-Output "npm: $\(\(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; Write-Output "docker: $\(\(Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)"; Write-Output "corepack: $\(\(Get-Command corepack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source\)")
